title: Playground Configuration Studio
concept: A settings-first, table-led Playground workspace for power users who need to verify WordPress, PHP, language, network, multisite, and reset impact before launching, saving, managing, or exporting browser-backed sites.
focus: explicit destructive reset and reload states
flows: Review runtime settings and reset impact before applying changes to an unsaved or saved Playground.
Save a temporary Playground to browser storage or a local directory with visible file-copy progress.
Manage saved and unsaved Playgrounds from a dense table with open, rename, delete, save, and manage actions.
Start new Playgrounds from Vanilla WordPress, WordPress PRs, Gutenberg PRs or branches, GitHub import, Blueprint URL, zip import, or featured Blueprint entries.
Use Site Manager settings, file browser, Blueprint editor, database tools, logs, Homepage, WP Admin, export to GitHub, download zip, and import zip surfaces from one studio.
featureCoverage: create from Gutenberg PR or branch
import from GitHub after account connection
browse and filter Blueprint gallery entries
save temporary Playground in browser storage
navigate active WordPress paths with URL input
refresh the active embedded WordPress page
use File browser with create folder/file, upload, browse, and code editing affordances
view, copy, download, and run the current Blueprint bundle
